notes: Desktop sublimation printer built on a Ricoh engine. Entry tier. Transfer workflow (print to paper -> heat press). Also does ChromaBlast (cotton) and EasySubli with alternate inks.
44-inch transfer dye-sub printer. Integrated cutter + take-up reel. F6470H 6-colour sibling shares the platform. ~60% faster than the prior F6370.
Dual-workflow: prints to transfer paper OR direct-to-fabric. 4/8-colour. Gold-plated anti-static piezo, 7 droplet sizes. ErgoSoft Roland edition RIP.
High-volume transfer sublimation. MWDT dot tech, dual-motor take-up, V-cut, post-heater. 10kg bulk ink + mini-jumbo roll options. ECO PASSPORT.

Industrial 3.3m press. iSUB = inline (contactless) sublimation fixation for 1-step direct-to-fabric, no separate calender; also prints transfer paper. Sublifix ink, integrated sew/stitch finishing. Larger P5 500 TEX iSUB (5.2m) launched 2025.
